content.en:
Huoyan Forbidden Land, a gourd mountain.

Surrounded by magma rivers, the rules on the mountain manifested, forming clouds of forbidden rules.

Abrupt.

The two figures came here, it was Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er.

"This is it!" Ouyang Jiu'er pointed to the gourd mountain road in front of him.

Ye Tian's divine sense probed the past, but he did not find the Haotian Emperor Mirror, but he found many forbidden and strange things.

"The Haotian Emperor Mirror is not on the mountain, but on the regular cloud, and it contains a huge space inside, we will know it when we go in!" Ouyang Jiu'er said.

Rushing!

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er flew into the rule cloud, and sure enough, they came to a huge space.

In this space, a huge black-gold mirror appeared in the void, connected to the rules of heaven and earth.

It stands here as if it were made of nature, without a trace of external interference.

"If Jiu'er doesn't tell me, even if I see this Haotian Emperor Mirror, I will think that it was born here, and I will definitely not think that someone put it here!" Ye Tian muttered.

Ouyang Jiu'er said: "The Haotian Emperor Mirror is a very secret forbidden treasure in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, even some emperors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace don't know the existence of this treasure, after all, the price paid to open it is too great, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace can't use the lives of countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors to help a Dao Ancestor evolve the way of the future! If this treasure is exposed, I'm afraid many emperors will have bad intentions! If it weren't for the fact that I have a special information channel, I'm afraid I don't know that the Heavenly Emperor Palace has the Haotian Emperor Mirror!"

"Let's start, it is estimated that this place will be exposed soon, even if no one finds out about this place, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will move a little, and there will be a little vision here, and there will definitely be a large number of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors rushing here! At that time, we will be in trouble!"

Ouyang Jiu'er urged.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian took out a large number of True Ancestors and some Dao Ancestor corpses that he had collected, and sacrificed them to the Haotian Emperor Mirror in front of him.

On the other side, Ouyang Jiu'er also began to sacrifice the corpses of those True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors.

Rumble!!!!!

The Haotian Emperor Mirror emitted light, constantly absorbing the blood and life force of those strong people.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian saw scenes of cultivation in the future from the Haotian Emperor Mirror, these pictures seemed to be his own experience, demonstrating the possibilities of the future for him, and finally finding a path that was most suitable for him to take.

Of course, this is not the real future, it just provides a correct path of cultivation.

But this is better than seeing the future directly, at least there will be no detours, and everyone's future is not necessarily on the right path, and many people have gone astray.

Ye Tian saw that he continued to comprehend and cultivate the forbidden Dao, and one by one the forbidden Dao came out, and finally realized the complete forbidden Dao, and then merged with his own Endless Dao to form his own Endless Taboo Dao.

After that, he broke through to the Dao Ancestor realm with the Endless Forbidden Dao.

After that, he created his own forbidden Dao technique, which surpassed the supreme Dao technique, was invincible in the world, and became the strongest invincible Dao ancestor.

After that, he realized a trace of the mystery of the Domain Ancestor, continued to cultivate, and progressed towards the half-step Domain Ancestor.

But suddenly, the picture disappeared, and many of the insights came to an abrupt end.

He saw that the countless corpses had been reduced to ashes, and the power of the sacrifice had been exhausted, causing the future path of his vision to be cut off.

It's a terrible feeling!

At this time, Ye Tian couldn't wait to kill countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors to continue to observe the future path.

But soon, Ye Tian calmed down.

"Huh, no wonder Jiu'er said that once the Haotian Emperor Mirror appears, countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors will fall and die, the temptation of the Haotian Emperor Mirror is too great, even the Supreme True Ancestor like me, who is not worried about the future at all, is almost enchanted, and the other Supreme Dao Ancestors who can't see the future path must be even more crazy. The invincible Dao Ancestors may still want to kill the Supreme Dao Ancestor, one corpse of the Supreme Dao Ancestor is worth countless True Ancestor corpses, and other Supreme Dao Ancestors will also kill other True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors at all costs, just for the future path to evolve further!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The other side.

Ouyang Jiu'er also ended the path of evolution, and seemed to have gained something, with a smile on his face, and he was in a very good mood.

"Let's go, let's continue to collect corpses! But you have to be calm, let's not make a move, only collect the corpses of the killed True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He had already calmed down, so naturally he would not be so reckless.

After Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er left, a true ancestor came and found the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and wanted to take the Haotian Emperor Mirror, but found that he couldn't take it at all.

Not long after, the news of the forbidden treasure of the Haotian Emperor Mirror spread, attracting a large number of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, and even the strongest Dao Ancestors were attracted to it.

In front of the mirror of Emperor Haotian.

A group of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors gathered here, and they didn't make a move, it seemed to be very harmonious, after all, there was no way to take away the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and there was no need to fight and kill.

Rumble!!!

The first Supreme Dao Ancestor to descend was the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

Subsequently, Heavenly Weapon Dao Ancestor, Tianqi Dao Ancestor, Sky Breaking Dao Ancestor, Silver Chopping Dao Ancestor, Blood Gang Dao Ancestor, Ten Killing Dao Ancestor, Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, Ten Thousand Sword Dao Ancestor, and Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor......

One by one, the strongest Dao Ancestors descended and tried to snatch the Haotian Emperor Mirror, but soon found that even they couldn't take this forbidden treasure.

"This Forbidden Treasure is completely locked with this large Forbidden Treasure Land, and it should be the most precious Forbidden Treasure of this Large Forbidden Treasure Land!"

Immediately, they began to study the usefulness of this forbidden artifact.

I saw that when the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor poured his own power into the Haotian Emperor Mirror, he actually saw a picture of the future road.

It's a pity that the power was consumed too quickly, so he didn't continue to pour power.

"This is the forbidden treasure of the future path of evolution!"

Yakumo Daozu was extremely excited.

He knew exactly what that meant.

He was able to use this forbidden treasure to evolve the path of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and even to the path of the half-step Domain Ancestor, and the future was bright, and there was no longer the slightest shackle.

Immediately, he went crazy.

He knew very well that what this forbidden treasure lacked was some kind of energy, and as long as the energy was satisfied, it could be turned on forever.

He tried to integrate some forbidden Dao stones into the Haotian Emperor Mirror, but it was of no use.

Soon, he figured it out.

What Haotian Emperor Mirror needs is energy that contains the breath of life, but he alone cannot meet the energy needs of Haotian Emperor Mirror.

Suddenly, he looked at those True Ancestors and the weaker Dao Ancestors.

Rumble!!!

The Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor made a move on these True Ancestors, and the power of the Dao Ancestor turned into silk threads, easily penetrating the body of a True Ancestor.

One True Ancestor after another fell and died, and thousands of True Ancestors were lost in the blink of an eye.

"Yakumo Dao Ancestor, are you crazy?"

The other Supreme Dao Ancestors said angrily.

Among some of the true ancestors who were killed, there were people from their sect, and the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestors were going to start an all-out war with them!

However, the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestors ignored it and continued to kill those True Ancestors, and even a few Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were killed by him, and all the corpses were collected by him.

A few seconds later, another supreme Dao Ancestor, the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, made a move, not to stop the Yayun Dao Ancestor, but also to kill those True Ancestors.

At this time, no matter how stupid the other Supreme Dao Ancestors were, they understood, and then thought about the previous actions of the Yayun Dao Ancestor and the Secret Sword Dao Ancestor, and quickly understood the effect of the Haotian Emperor Mirror.

All of a sudden, the True Ancestors became the targets of their killing, even if the descendants of their own sect were killed, they didn't care.

Nothing is more important than the road ahead.

True Ancestors and the weaker Dao Ancestors wanted to escape, but they couldn't do so at all.

This group of Supreme Dao Ancestors quickly killed these True Ancestors and the Five or Six Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Subsequently.

These supreme Dao ancestors began to sacrifice these corpses to the Haotian Emperor Mirror, opening the evolution of the future path.

Soon, they saw the right path to become an invincible Dao Ancestor one by one, and many feelings came to their hearts one by one, making them completely understand how to impact the Invincible Dao Ancestor and how to go on.

Of course.

Due to the limited number of corpses of True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor, the future path did not evolve to the half-step Domain Ancestor level.

As a result, the eyes of the Supreme Dao Ancestors looked at each other at the other Supreme Dao Ancestors.

"We don't need to fight each other, it's very difficult for everyone to kill a supreme Dao Ancestor, I don't know when the winner will be decided, why don't we go out, wait until we kill enough True Ancestors and ordinary Dao Ancestors and come back, how about it?" Yayun Dao Ancestor proposed.

"Yes!"

Many supreme Dao ancestors responded to the Tao.

In the days that followed, countless True Ancestors in the Huoyan Forbidden Land ushered in a catastrophe, constantly being attacked and killed by the strongest Dao Ancestors, and even walking on the road, they suddenly died.

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er saw this scene, but they couldn't care about it.

The attraction of the Haotian Emperor Mirror is too strong, and no one can ignore the Haotian Emperor Mirror, unless it is a half-step domain ancestor who will not care about the Haotian Emperor Mirror.

Soon, the Invincible Dao Ancestors also knew the news of the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and one by one they began to descend on the Huoyan Forbidden Land, and the battle here escalated in an instant.
